# Acme Corp — Contract Compliance Policy v2.1

## P-001: Termination Notice

All contracts must include a minimum 90-day written termination notice clause.
Contracts with less than 90 days notice are NON-COMPLIANT.

## P-002: Liability Cap

The liability cap must not exceed 2x the total annual contract value.
Uncapped liability clauses are NON-COMPLIANT.

## P-003: Data Privacy

All contracts involving data processing must reference GDPR or CCPA compliance.
Contracts without a data privacy clause are NON-COMPLIANT.

## P-004: Dispute Resolution

All contracts must specify arbitration as the primary dispute resolution mechanism.
Contracts specifying litigation only are NON-COMPLIANT.

## P-005: Payment Terms

Standard payment terms are Net-30. Net-60 or beyond requires CFO approval.
Contracts with payment terms beyond Net-30 without noted CFO approval are NON-COMPLIANT.
